title: Toiyabea peirsonii
taxonomy: Toiyabea peirsonii is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is a flowering plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The classification of Toiyabea peirsonii is within the genus Toiyabea, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Descurainia. Toiyabea peirsonii is often included in the tribe Arabideae, which is a subclade of the larger family Brassicaceae. Further research into its classification may reveal additional details and relationships within the plant kingdom.
